title: 6 x Stainless Steel Ashtray Diameter 8 cm
features: This ashtray is made of silver stainless steel.
The ashtray is round and has three places to put cigarettes. The bottom of the ashtray is flat and convenient to use.
The surface is polished, which makes cleaning very easy.
description: This ashtray is made of stainless steel in the colour silver. The ashtray is round and has three slots for cigarettes. The bottom of the ashtray is flat and convenient to use. The surface is polished, which allows for very easy cleaning.
